description: Calibrate driver behavior to model a 'cautious driver' profile in the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg) and analyze the impact on travel times. Create a modified vehicle types file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/cautious_vtypes.add.xml using Krauss car-following parameters (tau: 1.8, minGap: 3.5, sigma: 0.8) and a corresponding SUMO configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/cautious_run.sumocfg. Perform a comparative analysis between the baseline and cautious simulations, saving tripinfo results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_tripinfo.xml and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/cautious_tripinfo.xml. Produce a JSON report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/calibration_impact.json containing the average duration and timeLoss for both runs (keys: "baseline_avg_duration", "baseline_avg_timeLoss", "cautious_avg_duration", "cautious_avg_timeLoss") and a comparison bar chart at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/comparison_chart.png.
